title: DONATIONS - 211info
text: JACKSON STREET YOUTH SERVICES DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of clothing, bedding, linens, gift cards, or money. 225 SW 4th Street Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Corvallis: Tuesday-Wednesday 10am-1pm at 225 SW 4th Street, Corvallis, OR 97333 Albany Public Library: Thursday 10am-1pm at 2450 14th Avenue SE, Albany, OR 97322 Email (541) 760-5825 .. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 760-5825 Ben [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, email, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Benton, Lincoln, Linn, and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: Services: Bedding/Linen Donation Programs Clothing Donation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - NEXT STEPS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - MENTORING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OUTREACH INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PEER SUPPORT 541 LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - TOPSOCCER MUTUAL SUPPORT - QUEER PEERS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
